title: Config / Connections Tabs not saving positions
author: fsolfsch
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
When i sort my tabs Config and Connections, its not saved after reopening.

## Your Environment
<!--- Include as many relevant details about the environment you experienced the bug in -->
* Version used:
* Operating System and version (e.g. Windows 10 1709 x64):
Win 11 & Win Server 2019 / mRemote: v 1.77.2

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
RC update: packaged in parent PR #3128 and ready for retest on latest RC builds. 
PR: PR #3128 on `mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG` 
Scope: stop forcing Tree panel focus after dock-layout restore; preserve restored active Config/Connections panel state.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available in community release**

This fix is included in a community build from our fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). Available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and let us know if the issue is fully resolved.
